sections.title: If the player hasn't completed the Elite Karamja Diary

lines.speaker: Vigroy
lines.text: I am offering a cart ride to Brimhaven, if you're interested. It will cost [amount] coins. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please, I'd like to go to Brimhaven.

lines.speaker: Vigroy
lines.text: Sorry, but it looks as if you don't have enough money. Come and see me when you have enough for the ride.

lines.speaker: Vigroy
lines.text: Okay, Bwana, let me know if you change your mind.

sections.title: If the player has completed the Elite Karamja Diary

lines.speaker: Vigroy
lines.text: I am offering a cart ride to Brimhaven, if you're interested. For you, it's free.

sections.title: Talking to Vigroy before completing Shilo Village

lines.speaker: Vigroy
lines.text: Sorry, I'm busy. I've got to get out of here! This place is swarming with zombies.
